title: Cauthon RTP
description: a simple yet powerful RTP (Random Teleport) plugin
body:
## Cauthon RTP
A simple yet powerful and easy to use plugin for random teleportation in your minecraft server for your players.

Commands: (All of them does the same thing..)
1. /crtp
2. /cauthonrtp
3. /rtp

## Safety Included!
These blocks listed down:
1. Lava
2. Water
3. Cactus
4. Fire
5. Sweet Berry Bush
6. Magma Block
7. Campfire

Feel free to dm me for more dangerous blocks. (kane44hd - Discord)

We have a discord now!!! [https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD](https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD)
